description_long: This is a rectangular decorative pillow featuring a bold geometric pattern in black and off-white. The surface fabric appears to be woven, giving it a textured look and feel. The pillow is plump and filled, with slightly pointed corners and a soft, cushioned appearance. The geometric design consists of repeating diamond and zigzag motifs, reminiscent of Southwestern or tribal styles. No visible tags, labels, or brand logos are present on any side. The pillow is shown isolated against a plain background, with no contextual placement.
description: A rectangular, woven pillow with a black and off-white geometric pattern and a soft, cushioned appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern with two pointed corners visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the symmetry of the pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same geometric pattern and shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the pillow's thickness and edge pattern.
